documents.name: weather.txt
documents.text: The weather in Paris is mild in spring. Average temperatures range from 8 to 16 degrees Celsius in April and May.

documents.name: transit.txt
documents.text: The Paris metro operates 14 lines and serves more than 300 stations across the city and inner suburbs.
